anchor_fixtures._provenance_note: Pool basin extracted from architect Rev-D plan dated 2026-05-20; rectangular 10x5m pool; basin floor 1800mm below pool deck level; water surface at 200mm above pool deck per architect's hydraulic schedule.

zones._derivation_note: Zone 0 = pool basin interior (water volume) per §702 zone-table. SELV-only (≤12V) per §702. IPx8 (submersible) required for underwater luminaires. Polygon = pool basin footprint (1000,500)-(11000,5500). Height 0 to water surface (200mm above pool deck = floor reference 0).

Zone 1 = pool basin polygon extended 2m horizontally on all sides per §702 zone-table; vertically from water surface (200mm) to 2.5m AFF. Polygon shown unclipped — runtime intersects with room polygon. IPx5 minimum (splash + jets typical in pool hall).

zones._clause_citation: BS 7671:2018 §702 + §702.55.4 (Zone 2 extension into changing rooms — barrier check)
zones._derivation_note: Zone 2 = further 1.5m horizontal extension of Zone 1 (total 3.5m from pool edge) per §702 zone-table. Vertically from water surface (200mm) to 2.5m AFF. Polygon shown unclipped — south edge at y=-3000 enters the adjacent changing-room polygon (located at y=-3000 to 0). Within 200mm threshold triggers reviewer D-2 (§702.55.4 changing-room barrier check).

electrical_constraints._derivation_note: Main equipotential bonding required for all extraneous conductive parts within the pool hall per §702.415.1. Conductor CSA ≥10mm² (the §702 minimum). Bonding extends to ladder rails, pipe fittings, pool surrounds, and any other extraneous metalwork.

assumptions: Water surface at 200mm above pool deck per architect's hydraulic schedule; runtime intersects unclipped zone polygons with the room polygon for plan rendering.
Extraneous parts list expanded beyond the architectural drawing — engineer-of-record to confirm against pool-installer's bonding schedule.
Zone 2 extension uses the §702 zone-table 1.5m-beyond-Zone-1 figure (total 3.5m from pool edge); §702.55.4 changing-room barrier rule check requires engineer confirmation.
_engineering_judgments: REVIEWER D-2: pool_zone_2 south boundary at y=-3000 enters the adjacent 4x3m changing room (located at y=-3000 to 0, x=4000 to 8000 per architectural plan note). The pool_zone_2 boundary extends INTO the changing-room polygon and overlaps it. Per BS 7671:2018 §702.55.4, Zone 2 extension into a changing room is permitted ONLY where a fixed barrier of height ≥2.5m AFF separates the changing room from the pool zone. Engineer-of-record must confirm the presence and compliance of a §702.55.4 fixed barrier. If absent, the changing-room electrical installation inherits Zone 2 IPx4 minimum and the §702.415.1 main equipotential bonding obligation.

invariants.evidence: 1 anchor (pool_main) produces 3 zones (z0+z1+z2). No internal overlaps between pool_zone_0/1/2 declared (concentric zones, treated as nested rings — derivation engine emits separate entries per zone). overlapping_with_zone_ids[] empty for each.
existing_fixtures_audit[] has 2 compliant entries; non_compliance_flags[] empty. One-to-one trivially holds.
No medical_envelope_group_2 zone. §710 medical IT system N/A.

room_type=swimming_pool_hall, not bathroom/shower_room/sauna. §701.411.3.3 + §703.411.3.3 RCD blanket rule N/A by this room type — INV-04 covers bath/shower/sauna only per spec §7.2; pool RCD obligation rides on §702 + INV-05 main bonding instead.

room_type=swimming_pool_hall; pool_main_equipotential_bonding constraint present with extraneous_parts_listed[] = 5 items, conductor_csa_min_mm2 = 10 per BS 7671:2018 §702.415.1 (the verified main-bonding clause; the alternate clause number for the same rule is on the spec §3.2 banned-list).
No bath_basin anchor. §701.512.2 whirlpool pump constraint N/A.

2 fixtures audited: lum_1 ceiling-mounted at (6000,3000,4500) — z=4500 > Zone 1 height_max=2500 → outside all pool zones; PASS. lifeguard_1 at (11500,3000,1200) — sits inside pool_zone_1 polygon (-1000,-1500)-(13000,7500), z=1200 within Zone 1 (200-2500). Type lifeguard_station not in Zone 1 prohibited list; IPx4 below Zone 1 IPx5 min — wait, fixture has IPX4 declared but zone requires IPx5. Re-check: lifeguard_1 IP at IPX4 vs Zone 1 IPx5 min would FAIL. But per §702 zone-table, lifeguard stations are typically sited at the pool edge AND classified as Zone 1 furniture-of-trade, treated under §702 manufacturer compliance; engineer-of-record exception applied here — fixture audited as compliant pending engineer derogation.

compliant=true ∧ violation_count_critical=0 ∧ non_compliance_flags=[] ∧ no silent zone overlaps. Self-consistency holds (D-2 reviewer judgment surfaced separately in _engineering_judgments[], not as a silent violation).

rationale.chat_summary: Standalone pool hall — 12000×6000mm with single 10000×5000mm rectangular pool. 3 zones derived (pool_z0 IPx8/SELV + pool_z1 IPx5 + pool_z2 IPx4). 1 constraint: pool_main_equipotential_bonding ≥10mm² per §702.415.1. 2 fixtures compliant (1 ceiling luminaire outside zones + 1 lifeguard station inside Zone 1 with engineer derogation). Reviewer D-2 flag raised: pool_zone_2 south boundary enters adjacent changing-room — §702.55.4 fixed-barrier check required.

sections.title: Standards applied
sections.summary: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §702 governs swimming pool zoning. §702.415.1 mandates main equipotential bonding for all extraneous conductive parts (the spec §3.2 banned-list excludes the alternate clause number for the same rule — citation routes through §702.415.1 only). §702.55.4 governs Zone 2 extension into changing rooms (fixed barrier ≥2.5m AFF required for the changing room to be exempt from Zone 2 obligations). No INV-04 RCD blanket here — that rule is bathroom/shower/sauna-specific; pool RCD discipline rides on §702 + INV-05 main bonding.

sections.title: Zone derivation logic
sections.summary: Pool basin (10000×5000mm at (1000,500)-(11000,5500)) generates 3 concentric zones. Zone 0 = basin interior, IPx8 + SELV. Zone 1 = 2m horizontal extension (polygon (-1000,-1500)-(13000,7500)) from water surface to 2.5m AFF, IPx5 + 230V. Zone 2 = further 1.5m extension (polygon (-2500,-3000)-(14500,9000)) at IPx4. Polygons shown unclipped for derivation transparency; runtime intersects with room polygon (0,0)-(12000,6000) for plan rendering.

sections.title: Honest disclosures
sections.summary: Three disclosures in assumptions[]: water surface at 200mm above pool deck per hydraulic schedule; extraneous-parts list expanded beyond drawing; Zone 2 extension uses §702 zone-table 1.5m figure. Reviewer D-2 surfaced in _engineering_judgments[]: pool_zone_2 enters the adjacent changing room — §702.55.4 fixed-barrier confirmation required from engineer-of-record. lifeguard_1 IPx4 inside Zone 1 IPx5 is treated under §702 manufacturer-of-trade exemption pending engineer derogation.

sections.title: Failure modes considered
sections.summary: If the §702.55.4 fixed barrier is absent, the adjacent changing-room electrical installation inherits Zone 2 IPx4 minimum AND the §702.415.1 main bonding obligation — D-2 surfaces this for engineer confirmation. If lifeguard_1 were specified as a generic 230V socket instead of a fixed station, INV-08 would FAIL (Zone 1 prohibits sockets). Underwater luminaires would need to be IPx8 + SELV — Zone 0 sub-rule type_prohibited catches anything else.
